Meet the Fockers (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $279,167,575Details
International Box Office $237,400,000
Worldwide Box Office $516,567,575
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$46,120,980 (16.5% of total gross)
Legs:6.05 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:54.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$60,000,000 (worldwide box office is 8.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,518 opening theaters/3,554 max. theaters, 8.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $528,872,671

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 22nd, 2004 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: December 24th, 2004 (Wide), released as Meet The Fockers (Australia)
Video Release: April 19th, 2005 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude and sexual humor, language and a brief drug reference.
Running Time: 114 minutes
Franchise: Meet the Parents
Cast, crew, or production detail: Frat Pack
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, In-Laws / Future In-Laws
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Dreamworks LLC, Tribeca Film, Everyman Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
